en.extract:
The streak-eared bulbul (Pycnonotus conradi) is a member of the bulbul family of passerine birds. 
It is found from Thailand and northern and central Malay Peninsula to southern Indochina.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests.
The streak-eared bulbul was originally described in the genus Criniger. Until 2016, the streak-eared bulbul was considered to be conspecific with the Ayeyarwady bulbul while still using the name 'streak-eared bulbul' (as Pycnonotus blanfordi).


Diet
It is a frugivore.


References

The '''streak-eared bulbul''' ('''''Pycnonotus conradi''''') is a member of the [[bulbul]] family of [[passerine]] [[bird]]s. 
It is found from Thailand and northern and central [[Malay Peninsula]] to southern [[Indochina]].
Its natural [[habitat]] is subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s.

The streak-eared bulbul was originally described in the genus ''[[Criniger]]''. Until 2016, the streak-eared bulbul was considered to be conspecific with the [[Ayeyarwady bulbul]] while still using the name 'streak-eared bulbul' (as ''Pycnonotus blanfordi'').<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://www.worldbirdnames.org/updates/species-updates/|title=Species Updates « IOC World Bird List|website=www.worldbirdnames.org|language=en-US|access-date=2017-03-31}}</ref>

== Diet ==
It is a frugivore.<ref>{{Cite journal |last=Yarnvudhi |first=Arerut |last2=Leksungnoen |first2=Nisa |last3=Siri |first3=Supalak |last4=Ponpithuk |first4=Yuwadee |last5=Sukmasuang |first5=Ronglarp |last6=Duengkae |first6=Prateep |last7=Pongcharoen |first7=Chattraphas |last8=Sutummawong |first8=Nantida |last9=Marod |first9=Dokrak |last10=Wachrinrat |first10=Chongrak |last11=Premashthira |first11=Aerwadee |last12=Tor-ngern |first12=Pantana |last13=Poungcharean |first13=Santi |last14=Hermhuk |first14=Sutheera |last15=Kachina |first15=Panida |date=2022-09-24 |title=Monetary evaluation of supporting ecosystem services as a habitat provider for birds in Thailand urban park |url=http://dx.doi.org/10.13057/biodiv/d230942 |journal=Biodiversitas Journal of Biological Diversity |volume=23 |issue=9 |doi=10.13057/biodiv/d230942 |issn=2085-4722|doi-access=free }}</ref>
